hero.subline: I design and develop modern, fast & professional websites — custom booking systems, admin panels and more. Based in Flanders, working globally.

workWith.heading: I Work With
workWith.subline: Local businesses in Flanders that need a website that actually brings in clients — not just looks good.

whatIBuild.heading: What I Build
whatIBuild.subline: Everything your business needs online — designed clean, built fast, delivered ready to use.

booking.title: Booking Systems
booking.description: Custom online booking tailored to your business — services, team members, time slots. Clients book 24/7, you stay in control.

admin.title: Admin Panels
admin.description: A private dashboard where you manage appointments, view client data and update your content — no tech knowledge needed.

landing.title: Landing Pages
landing.description: Fast, modern and conversion-focused. Built to make a strong first impression and turn visitors into paying clients.

custom.title: Custom Features
custom.description: Need something specific? Multi-language support, loyalty systems, CMS, custom forms — if you can imagine it, we build it.

portfolio.heading: Recent Work
portfolio.subline: A selection of projects built for local businesses. Each one custom — no templates, no shortcuts.
portfolio.demoPrompt: Want to see a live demo of any of these?

process.heading: The Process
process.subline: From first message to live website — clear steps, no surprises.
process.readyPrompt: Ready to start? The first step is free.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We start with a free consultation — you tell me about your business, goals and vision. I ask the right questions to understand exactly what you need.

design.title: Design
design.description: I create a visual direction based on your brand. You see exactly what the site will look like before a single line of code is written.

build.title: Build
build.description: Once design is approved, I build the full site — fast, clean code, mobile-first. You get progress updates throughout.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: We test everything, connect your domain and go live. I stay available for 1 month after launch to fix anything that comes up.

testimonials.heading: What Clients Say
testimonials.subline: Real feedback from businesses in Flanders.
testimonials.placeholder: * Placeholder reviews — replace with real client feedback before launch.

pricing.heading: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subline: No surprises, no hidden fees. All prices are indicative — final quote after a free consultation.
pricing.supportNote: * 1 month free support included with every project
pricing.note: 1 month free support included with every project. Domain & hosting on your side (~€10–15/yr + Vercel).

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for small businesses that need a clean, fast landing page.

business.name: Business
business.description: Full booking system with admin panel. The most popular choice.

custom.name: Custom
custom.description: Multi-language, CMS, loyalty systems or anything specific to your business.

contact.heading: Let's Work Together
contact.subline: Got a project in mind? Tell me about your business and I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.availableNote: Currently taking on new clients in Flanders and remotely across Belgium.
contact.placeholderMessage: Tell me about your project — what you need, your timeline, any questions...
contact.successText: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you within 24 hours.

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js · Tailwind CSS · Framer Motion
